title: Calling SQL from SPARQL: Transaction deadlocked
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), value FLOAT, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, value) VALUES (1, 'Sample A', 0.8);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, value) VALUES (2, 'Sample B', NULL);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL AND value > (SELECT AVG(value) FROM test_table);
UPDATE test_table SET value = CAST('1.5' AS FLOAT) WHERE id = 1;
key_bug_features: Calling SQL from SPARQL causes transaction deadlock
